title: Custom Needle Felted Dog Portrait – Handmade Pet Memorial Gift in Wooden Hoop Frame
material: 100% wool roving, glass eyes, wooden hoop
metaTitle: Custom Needle Felted Dog Portrait | Handmade Pet Memorial Gift
metaDescription: Create a lifelike custom needle felted dog portrait from your photo. Perfect pet memorial gift, handmade with wool roving & glass eyes. Order now!
shortDescription: Handcrafted custom dog portrait made from 100% wool roving, set in an 8-inch wooden hoop. A heartfelt memorial gift for pet lovers.
fullDescription:
Capture the soul of your beloved canine companion with this exquisite custom needle felted dog portrait. Handcrafted with care by skilled artisans, each portrait is a one-of-a-kind tribute that brings your dog’s unique personality to life.

**Why This Gift is Special**
Made from 100% wool roving, glass eyes, and set in a rustic wooden hoop frame, this portrait is more than decor—it’s a lasting memory. Whether as a dog memorial gift or a celebration of your furry friend, it’s a timeless keepsake.

**Customization Process**
1. Send us a clear, high-resolution photo of your dog’s face.
2. We hand-felt the wool fiber by fiber to match colors, fur texture, and expressions.
3. Add a personalized text (name, date, or a short message) to the hoop.
4. Your order is crafted within 14-18 days and shipped with care.

**Specifications**
- Material: 100% wool roving, glass eyes, wooden hoop
- Size: 8-inch round frame
- Production time: 14-18 days
- Text customization: Yes (name/date)

**Perfect Occasions**
- Sympathy gift for a friend who lost a pet
- Anniversary or birthday surprise for dog lovers
- Memorial decor for your own home

**Care Instructions**
Keep away from moisture and direct sunlight. Gently dust with a soft brush to maintain shape.

Order your custom needle felted dog portrait today and turn a precious memory into a work of art.
